title: hydrangea bretschneideri var. giraldii
intro: Hydrangea bretschneideri var. giraldii, also known as the Chinese mountain hydrangea or climbing hydrangea, is a deciduous shrub native to China that is characterized by its large, white, fragrant flowers and its ability to climb up trees and other supports using its aerial roots. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of Hydrangea bretschneideri var. giraldii include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain, inflammation, and oxidative stress, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Hydrangea bretschneideri var. giraldii include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions, including fever, sore throats, and digestive issues.
